✦  WELCOME TO CHARACTER-SHEET

A personal life dashboard styled as an RPG character sheet. Edit fields directly in the app, or journal with an AI that updates your data for you.

⚠ Privacy note:
  • Your data is stored only in this browser. No server, no accounts, no telemetry.
  • Export regularly and store your data.json somewhere safe (encrypted folder, password manager attachment, or offline drive). It's your private diary.
  • If you journal with an AI (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.), your provider may store, review, or use what you share for training. Check your provider's privacy settings and turn off data retention / training opt-in if available.
  • For full privacy, use a local model like Ollama and paste its output manually. Nothing leaves your machine.
1
Click any field to edit it. Start with your name and main quest at the top. Most text in the app is editable in place.
2
Fill in the tabs at your own pace: Quests, Skills, Enemies, Allies, Achievements. You don't need to fill everything out at once.
3
Export regularly. Use the Export ↓ button to save a backup of your data.json. Store it somewhere safe.
✦
You can add AI journalling at any time. Download instructions.md from the Help screen and upload it to a Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini project.
1
Download instructions.md, the file that tells your AI how this app works.
2
Create a project in your AI of choice. Claude Projects, ChatGPT Projects, or Gemini Gems all work. Upload instructions.md to the project's knowledge so it's always attached.
3
Start a new chat and tell your AI: "I'm setting up character-sheet. Start by asking me what's going on in my life right now."
4
When you're done, ask your AI: "Update my data" and copy the output.
5
your data (bottom-right of the app), paste the output, and hit Apply. Your sheet updates instantly.

Balance between elements. 100% means all equal, lower means divergence.

Some optional inspiration for what you might want to start journalling about

"Here's what's been going on lately..."
"I want to [goal/change/achieve something]... let's talk through it"
"I completed [something] recently. Wanted to log it and figure out what's next"
"I've been struggling with [pattern/situation] and can't seem to shift it"
"Quick check in. Here's where things stand across my main areas of focus..."
"I want to go deeper on one thing today:"
"[Guided] Interview me. I want to update my whole sheet"

♥  SUPPORT THIS PROJECT

character-sheet is free, open source, and always will be. I built it because I wanted it to exist: a personal life dashboard that's genuinely private, locally owned, and helps you reflect on what actually matters.

If it's been useful to you, a small contribution helps keep it going.

10% of any donations support the Center for Humane Technology, a nonprofit working to ensure AI and social media serve human wellbeing, rather than exploit it.
♥ Sponsor on GitHub View on GitHub

character-sheet is not a replacement for professional mental health support. If you're struggling, please reach out to a qualified professional or a service like CALM or Befrienders Worldwide.

?  HOW CHARACTER-SHEET WORKS
⬡  Setup / Update
⚠ Re-upload instructions.md to Claude -- clears after next journal session
First time & when updated
↓
Download character-sheet.html and open it in your browser. This unlocks import & export.
1
Download character-sheet.html Open it in your browser (Firefox, Chrome, etc.)

Using AI journalling? Download instructions.md and upload it to a Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini project.

↑  Import
Load your data into the character-sheet
Use Import to restore a backup, migrate from another device, or load an update from AI journalling.
1
Open Import:
2
Paste your data.json into the text area and hit Apply. Or use the file picker to load directly from disk.

Using AI journalling? After a session, ask your AI: "Update my data.json". Copy the JSON data it outputs and paste into the Import tab.

↓  Export
Download or back up your data
Your data lives in browser storage. Export regularly so you have a backup. Store it somewhere safe.
1
Export your data: Copy or download the JSON.
2
Store it securely. data.json contains your private notes. Treat it like a diary.

Using AI journalling? Paste this JSON into your AI project to replace the old data.json, so your AI has your latest state next session.

A warning banner will appear when you have made edits in the app that are not yet exported.

HOW SYNC WORKS

Changes are saved locally in your browser. Export ↓ to create a backup or to keep an AI up to date with your latest state.

All data was reset.
⚙  SECURITY

⚠ Your data is stored only in this browser. Nothing leaves your machine unless you send it. If you journal with an AI, that provider may store what you share with them. Use Firefox if possible; Chrome and Edge share storage across local files. A password encrypts your data at rest in the browser.

Password Protection

When set, all local data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Use a long random password from a password manager for strongest protection.

⚠ If you forget your password, your data cannot be recovered. Keep an export of your data.json as a backup.

Auto-Lock After
Danger Zone

This deletes everything: your character, quests, skills, history, and settings. An undo option will appear for 60 seconds after reset.

Level reached
5
Level Up
↑  IMPORT

Paste a data.json here and hit Apply. Use this to restore a backup, migrate from another device, or import an update from your AI after a journalling session.

⚠ data.json contains your private data. Treat it like a diary and don't share it casually.

↓  EXPORT
Export data.json

Your portable data snapshot. Use for backup, device migration, or to share your latest state with your AI project.

Migrate / backup localstorage (optional)

Exports all app data, including quest and xp history, etc. Use this for moving between devices or browsers.

⚠ This file is large. Do not paste it into an AI chat. It's for device migration only.

⚠ Both files contain your private data. Treat them like a diary. Uploading to an AI service or cloud storage means trusting that provider with your data.

Delete?
